headline: Defense Tech Rotation Accelerates as High-Margin Compounders Eclipse Prime Contractors
summary: Defense sector rotation is underway: traditional primes lag while high-growth defense tech stocks surge. Howmet Aerospace, TransDigm Group, and Curtiss-Wright lead with double-digit revenue growth, high ROIC, and strong momentum in jet engines, aftermarket parts, and naval systems.
